title: Bird Nests
description: Adds bird nests falling out of trees, which contain random loot!
body:
# Bird nests fall out of trees!

# Right clicking on them gives you loot! Vanilla-like loot boxes/lucky blocks in item form from what birds left behind! In order of likelyhood to get:

# Config Do you find too many bird nests? too few? You can change how many leaves, on average, need to be broken to get a bird nest! Go to `(minecraft_folder)/config/birdnest.json` Change `"leaves": 250` (the default) to any number, meaning how many leaves to break to get 1 birds nest (on average)
